metadata.description: Markdown judgment-injection skill for Claude Code — consistent reports, agent specs, and collaboration docs

plugins.name: markdownseed
plugins.description: Injects senior technical writer judgment into Claude Code for markdown documents. Three on-demand skills: md-report (decision-first reports), md-spec (agent/system specs), md-collab (async collaboration messages). Loaded only when invoked — no always-on context overhead.
